title: freshness.output
description: Image age and delta versus latest tag.

analyzer.description: Unique identifier for the Freshness analyzer.

repository.description: The image repository that was analyzed.

tag.description: The image tag that was analyzed.

tag_created.description: ISO timestamp of when the current tag was created.

latest_created.description: ISO timestamp of when the 'latest' tag was created.

age_days.description: Number of days since the current tag was created.

behind_latest_days.description: Number of days between the creation of this tag and the 'latest' tag.

is_latest.description: True if the current tag points to the same digest as the 'latest' tag.
